# lineGradient

**Interface Property**

The gradient to apply along the line.

## Declaration

```swift
lineGradient?: LineGradient;
```

## Discussion

If a style has both [doc://com.apple.mapkitjs/documentation/MapKitJS/Style/strokeColor] and [doc://com.apple.mapkitjs/documentation/MapKitJS/Style/lineGradient] definitions, [doc://com.apple.mapkitjs/documentation/MapKitJS/Style/lineGradient] takes precedence and displays. If you don’t define a color at the start or end location within the gradient, MapKit JS uses the style’s [doc://com.apple.mapkitjs/documentation/MapKitJS/Style/strokeColor].

## Setting stroke styles

- **strokeColor**: The stroke color of a line.
- **strokeOpacity**: The opacity of the stroke color.
- **strokeStart**: The unit distance along the line where a stroke begins.
- **strokeEnd**: The unit distance along the line where a stroke ends.
